items.title: Proposed data centre in South Australia dividing locals who want the jobs but fear water demand
items.summary: To its supporters, this proposed data centre will provide much-needed regional jobs, but in the nation's driest state, critics say the draw on river water to cool the machines could be too great.

items.title: Cheat Sheet: Toy Story has changed animation every step of the way

items.title: Pauline Hanson's views on paid parental leave outdated and concerning, advocates say

items.title: US primary elections swamped with accusations of funny business

items.title: Are old buildings the solution to new homes in a housing crisis?
